calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-26-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: William P. Lamb, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Petitioners Father of Minor Kai S. Kwok and Mother of Minor Man Chan Lieu present in court.
Petitioners Sworn and examined through Cantonese Interpreter Kamei Kwan.
Proof of Publication on file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor from Sum Yi Kwok to Sharie Sum Yi Kwok, and for Change of Name of minor from Tsz Chun Kwok to Jonathan Tsz Chun Kwok, and for Change of Name of Petitioner form Tsui S. Cheung, aka Tsui Shang Cheung to Suzanne Tsui Shan Kwok.
Decree Changing Names signed in open court.
